stories.title: How the USMNT went from embarrassment in Italy to ...
stories.summary: The U.S. is set to lean on title-toting talents. The last time America hosted, in 1994, things were very different.

stories.title: Ex-DC on Browns exit: Forced marriages fail
stories.summary: Jim Schwartz, who resigned from his position as the Browns' defensive coordinator in February after being passed over for Cleveland's head coaching job, explained his decision to step down.

stories.title: Hertl caps rally in third as Knights swipe Game 1
stories.summary: Tomas Hertl scored 16:36 into the third period, his fourth goal of the postseason, as the Golden Knights overcame an early deficit to defeat the Hurricanes 5-4 in Game 1 of the Stanley Cup Final.

stories.title: Scottie, seeking career Slam, scouts Shinnecock
stories.summary: Scottie Scheffler made his first visit Monday to Shinnecock Hills Golf Club in Southampton, New York, which will host the 126th U.S. Open from June 18-21.

stories.title: Shnaider stuns No. 1 Sabalenka at French Open
stories.summary: Top-ranked Aryna Sabalenka, up a set and two breaks in the second, suffered a shocking defeat in three sets to Diana Shnaider in the French Open quarterfinals on Wednesday.
